description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

On Tuesday, April 14, I had the opportunity to address students at Surugadai University as this year's endowed lecture series began.

Hanno City has maintained a basic partnership agreement with Surugadai University since 2011 (Heisei 23). Since fiscal 2015 (Heisei 27), as part of this partnership, we have been sending city staff members to serve as instructors.

This lecture series comprises 15 sessions covering the structure and role of local government, the qualities needed in local civil servants, and Hanno City's priority policies. It is a distinctive offering from Surugadai University for students aspiring to careers in local government.

I hope all of you will study "Local Administration and Law" thoroughly, and through this learning, I look forward to your growth and success.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202604/13455.html
summary: 📝 Mayor's remarks: Surugadai University endowed lecture guidance
